english translation text: The clothes of Hussain (a.s.) are all torn and in pieces while he walks towards the battlefield

The caravan is now in the hands of Sajjad (a.s)
Whilst comforting his tearful sisters he now goes towards the battlefield
After Abbas was martyred the back of Hussain (a.s) was broken, he still went to the battlefield and picked up the bodies
Carrying Asgher in his arms, he moves towards the battlefield

Oh akhtar how can I explain how oppressed our Imam (a.s) was,
he left behind the thirsty children and left for the battlefield

urdu transliteration text:
Choor Ke Ghar Baar Mil Kay Naal Behna BetianAhmed E Mukhtar Nu Kar Ke Udaas Ay Tur Paya
Making the Prophet sorrowful, he moves towards the battlefield

Lori Suna Rahi Hun- I am telling a bedtime rhyme
english translation text: Leaving his home, along with his sisters and daughters,
